Backup Schedule

Sets the interval between automatic database backups (the SW_BACKUP_INTERVAL setting). The backup scheduler starts when Stillwater launches, so a new interval takes effect after the next restart. Read more →

How often Stillwater takes an automatic database backup.

hours Saved

Number of hours between automatic backups. Must be a positive whole number.

Restart required to apply the new backup interval
Restart Stillwater for the new backup interval to take effect. The backup scheduler is started once at launch and does not pick up the change while running.
